prompt: 3-month moving average of monthly gross sales (current + previous two months), displayed at month level, handling the first months with fewer than 3 months of data. Grounded in Retail-v2.

assertions.text: Averages MONTHLY totals, not daily fact rows (does not just AVERAGEX over Sales rows or divide by day count)
Establishes a 3-month window at month grain, e.g. DATESINPERIOD('Date'[Date], MAX('Date'[Date]), -3, MONTH) or iterating VALUES of a month column
Handles partial windows correctly — divides by the actual number of months that have data (or uses AVERAGEX over months, which handles it naturally), rather than always dividing by 3
Emits valid, compilable DAX (correct RETURN keyword, balanced VAR/RETURN, no syntax errors)
